protocol.name: ID-JAG Token Exchange Flow
protocol.description: Identity Assertion Authorization Grant (ID-JAG) enables agents to exchange signed JWT assertions for access tokens, providing automated, policy-based authorization without human interaction.

entities.name: OAIAF Agent
entities.description: AI agent using OAIAF framework with IDJAGProvider

entities.name: Authorization Server
entities.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization server supporting token exchange

entities.name: Resource Server
entities.description: Protected API that validates access tokens

phases.name: Assertion Creation
phases.description: Agent creates signed JWT assertion with identity claims

phases.name: Token Exchange
phases.description: Agent exchanges assertion for access token via RFC 8693

phases.name: Resource Access
phases.description: Agent accesses protected resource with bearer token

flows.label: Create JWT Assertion
flows.description: Agent creates a signed JWT assertion containing identity claims (iss, sub, aud, scope)

annotations.text: JWT signed with agent's private key (ES256, RS256, or EdDSA)

flows.description: Agent sends token exchange request with JWT assertion as subject_token

flows.label:
Validate JWT Signature
Check Agent Registration
Evaluate Policies
flows.description: Authorization server validates JWT signature, checks agent is registered, evaluates delegation policies

annotations.text: Verify agent key via JWKS or pre-registered key

flows.label:
200 OK
{access_token, token_type, expires_in}
flows.description: Authorization server returns access token if validation succeeds

flows.label:
400 Bad Request
{error: invalid_grant}
flows.description: Authorization server returns error if assertion is invalid

flows.label: Cache Token
flows.description: Agent caches token keyed by scope for reuse until expiration

flows.label:
GET /api/resource
Authorization: Bearer {token}
flows.description: Agent makes authorized request to protected resource

flows.label: Validate Token
flows.description: Resource server validates token (signature, expiry, scope)

components.name: Identity Provider
components.description: OAuth/OIDC authorization server with ID-JAG support

components.name: Protected Resource
components.description: API protected by OAuth bearer tokens

trust_relations.description: Agent authenticates with signed JWT assertion
IdP issues access token to agent
Resource trusts tokens issued by IdP
